{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/159286161?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/vnth4nhnt", "id": 159286161, "login": "vnth4nhnt", "node_id": "U_kgDOCX6DkQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54319", "cvss": {"score": 4.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-250", "name": "Execution with Unnecessary Privileges"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-269", "name": "Improper Privilege Management"}], "description": "## Summary
A sandbox volume reference (`volumeId`, which may also be a volume name) was forwarded to the
runner and used to build the host bind-mount source path without confinement. A reference
containing path-traversal sequences could in principle resolve the mount source outside the
intended per-volume base directory.

## Impact
Had the traversal been reachable, an authenticated user could have caused the runner to
bind-mount an unintended host path into their sandbox, with a worst-case impact of read and
write access to other tenants' volume data (per-volume FUSE mounts are world-readable and
writable).

Important: this path was not exploitable in any released version. A volume reference is
validated against the database before it reaches the runner, and the volume id column is a
UUID type, so a reference containing traversal sequences is rejected at validation time and
the request fails before any mount is constructed. We could not reproduce cross-tenant access
or an out-of-base host mount on a released build; the observable effect of the documented
payload was a server-side validation error. Severity is assessed as Medium on that basis.

## Patches
Fixed in v0.186.0. Volume references are now resolved to the canonical volume UUID
server-side before reaching the runner, so a name can never flow downstream as a path
component, and the runner confines the mount source to the volume base directory and rejects
any non-UUID reference.

## Workarounds
Upgrade to v0.186.0 or later. No configuration workaround is required for released versions,
which were not exploitable.

## Credit
Reported by @vnth4nhnt from CyStack.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00171, "percentile": 0.06706}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fjv8-j4p5-cr9m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T17:19:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fjv8-j4p5-cr9m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fjv8-j4p5-cr9m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54319"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-18T17:19:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/daytonaio/daytona/security/advisories/GHSA-fjv8-j4p5-cr9m", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fjv8-j4p5-cr9m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/daytonaio/daytona/security-advisories/GHSA-fjv8-j4p5-cr9m", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/daytonaio/daytona", "summary": "Daytona: Path traversal in sandbox volume id mounts arbitrary host paths into the sandbox — cross-tenant data access and host escape", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T17:19:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fjv8-j4p5-cr9m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.186.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/daytonaio/daytona"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.185.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Daytona: Path traversal in sandbox volume id mounts arbitrary host paths into the sandbox — cross-tenant data access and host escape
